name: Alton Central School
description: Alton Central School is a place to play pickleball in Alton, NH. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Center Harbor Tennis Courts
description: Center Harbor Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Center Harbor, NH. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Club Piklbal!
description:
Court surfaces are professional  Acrytech cushioned courts.  Only the best court surface for Piklbal!
5 different level open play sessions.
3 professional trainers available on site for group and individual lessons.

name: Francoeur Field
description: Francoeur Field is a place to play pickleball in Gilford, NH. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Gilford Hills Tennis & Fitness
description: Gilford Hills Tennis & Fitness is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Gilford, NH. There are 3 indoor concrete courts. You’ll have to create your own lines, but portable nets are available. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons.

name: Gilford Youth Center
description:
Drop In pickleball Monday/Wednesday/Friday 8:30-10:30 am - 24 player limit - first come first serve- can not enter building before 8:30- $5 fee
Court Rentals available Fridays 10:30-1:30 
$20 per court per hour - as many players as renter wants
fees:
Fee required — $5 drop in fee
$20 for court rental per court per hour
As many players as renter would like

name: Laconia Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Laconia Community Center in Laconia, NH! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Leavitt Park, Laconia
description: Leavitt Park, Laconia is a place to play pickleball in Laconia, NH. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Liberty Tree Park Tennis Courts
description: Liberty Tree Park Tennis Courts is a place to play pickleball in Alton, NH. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Memorial Park -Laconia
description: Come play pickleball at Memorial Park -Laconia in Laconia, NH! There are 5 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Meredith Community Center
description: Meredith Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Meredith, NH. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — $20 for Residents and $30 for Non-residents

name: Prescott Park
description: Prescott Park is a place to play pickleball in Meredith, NH. There are 12 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Prospect Mountain High School
description: Prospect Mountain High School is a place to play pickleball in Alton, NH. The court surface is hard. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A membership is required to play.
